page_metadata.biotools__summary: DockingPie is a plugin of the popular molecular graphics system PyMOL that offers a versatile and user-friendly graphical user interface for assisting molecular and consensus docking analyses.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: DockingPie is a plugin of the popular molecular graphics system PyMOL that offers a versatile and user-friendly graphical user interface for assisting molecular and consensus docking analyses.
